scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=extension && npm run test --workspace=serve
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck --workspace=extension && npm run lint --workspace=extension && npm run test:run --workspace=extension && npm run typecheck --workspace=serve && npm run test --workspace=serve
scripts.firefox:dev: npm run install:firefox && npm run firefox
scripts.firefox:debug: npm run install:firefox:debug && npm run firefox
